Alarm Details: Steam supply is below minimum pressure. Triggers an automatic cycle abort if detected during active phases (disabled in Standby per SB 166).
Compressed air supply is below minimum pressure. Triggers an automatic cycle abort during active phases.
Water flow is below the minimum required value for the condenser or vacuum pump.
External steam supply exceeds the maximum safety setpoint.
External compressed air supply exceeds the maximum safety setpoint.
External water flow rate exceeds the maximum safety setpoint.
A power loss was detected during an active cycle. Logic maintains Door Cover state (In/Out) upon power restoration.
Alarm Details
Generator failed to heat within the allotted time for AutoStart.
AutoStart failed because Door 1 or Door 2 was left open.
Generator pressure exceeded the maximum allowance.
Generator temperature exceeded the maximum safety limit.
Steam generator detected a dangerously low water level.
Generator took too long to reach operating pressure.
Level probe is disconnected or reading out of range.
Generator pressure and temperature readings do not match.
Clean steam pre-heat tank took too long to fill.
Pre-heat tank took too long to reach operating temperature.
Clean steam generator failed to reach pressure.
Door 1 or Door 2 took too long to fully open or close.
Light curtain beam was broken by an object during door movement.
Incorrect gearbox or drive ratio settings detected in software.
Motor detected a rapid change in torque required for movement.
Door movement stopped due to a physical obstruction.
The decorative door cover failed to retract.
The external service panel is open or the microswitch is not engaged.
The decorative door cover failed to inflate/expand.
Gasket has not inflated to the minimum required air pressure.
Gasket pressure has exceeded the maximum safety limit.
The vacuum pulse failed to reach the target level in time.
The pressure pulse failed to reach the target level in time.
The cycle exceeded the pulse limit (40) without reaching target temp.
The stage is nearing a timeout fault before reaching sterilize temp.
The stage took too long to reach the sterilizing temperature.
Chamber temperature fell below the minimum during the sterilize stage.
Chamber temperature exceeded the maximum limit during sterilization.
Difference between Air Detector and Drain probes is >2°C.
The Air Detector Test failed to detect air when it was expected.
Air detected during an Air Detector type cycle (Expected Result).
Excessive air detected during the Air Admission Stage.
Air Detector reached temperature during a SMART cycle; needs calibration.
The exhaust stage took too long to reach the vacuum setpoint.
The drying stage took too long to achieve the required vacuum level.
The cycle was manually stopped by an operator.
Pressure change >10.8 kPa during the 5-minute stabilize stage.
Pressure change >1.3 kPa during a 10-minute leak rate test.
Steam pressure is below the minimum operational requirement.
Compressed air supply is below the minimum required pressure.
Water flow rate is below the minimum required value.
Steam Supply pressure has exceeded the maximum limit.
Air Supply pressure has exceeded the maximum limit.
Water flow rate has exceeded the maximum limit.
A power interruption was detected during an active cycle.
